title: dataCleanup
text: dataCleanup Cleans up the widget when it is unbound from a data object. dataCleanup(dataNames) Arguments dataNames A Set containing the names of all properties that were changed through dataUpdate() calls since this widget was connected to this data object. Exceptions None Return value None Description The framework calls the dataCleanup() function to give the widget an opportunity to clean up its data-related internals. The widgets are reused by the framework, so it is important that they clear up after themselves to avoid bugs. This function's argument describes the names of all properties that were changed through dataUpdate() calls since this widget was connected to this data object when its dataInit() function was called. The dataNames argument is a set of strings with the following properties: Explain this code Set(n){ "prop_id", "html:prop_id", "style:prop_id", "class:class_name", "valrep", "value" } Where n is the number of properties in the set.
